name: Custard Pie (Kh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs slightly.
2. Add sugar, nutmeg, and salt; beat until blended.
3. Gradually add the scalded milk and cream, stirring constantly.
4. Mix in vanilla extract.
5. Strain into pie shell.
6. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes.
7. Reduce oven temperature to 350°F and bake an additional 15 to 20 minutes, or until a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean.
8. Cool on wire rack.
9. Place in refrigerator until ready to serve.
